summary: All three iteration-1 MEDIUM suggestions applied: CCR2 -> Lignin_SG_Ratio (+1) and PT4CL1 -> Lignin_SG_Ratio (+1) now capture the preferential-S-reduction biology that cascade-only geometric-mean propagation could not model; MYB74 -> CCOAOMT1 (+1) raises CCOAOMT1 from 47% to 53% key-player coverage. All 5 structural checks still pass, schema passes, no new topology hazards introduced. Network is approved for Step 3 PERTURBATION.

pathway_completeness.justification: Unchanged from iteration 1. Phenylpropanoid entry, shared monolignol middle, G-branch, S-branch, master-switch cascade, hormone input (Auxin/ARF2.1) and environment (Tension_Wood) all represented. Polymerization and monolignol-degradation arms intentionally excluded.

mechanistic_depth.justification: Six direct-phenotype edges now (F5H1, Sinapyl_Alcohol, MYB152, Tension_Wood, CCR2, PT4CL1 as activators; Coniferyl_Alcohol and C3H1 as inhibitors). The new CCR2/PT4CL1 direct edges are biologically justified flux-level bypasses rather than shortcuts. Cascade propagation through metabolites still present.

motif_coverage.justification: Unchanged from iteration 1. Motif 3 (Coherent Feed-Forward Loop) now strengthened: CCR2, PT4CL1, and F5H1 each feed the phenotype BOTH directly AND via the monomer-pool cascade. Motif 4 (Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance) still not applied (literature gap).

cascade_balance.justification: Unchanged. Source % 25% (literature-gap justified). Lignin_SG_Ratio now at 6 activators + 2 inhibitors = 8 total inputs (within 7+ cap but above 5 ideal - acceptable trade-off for direction-correct perturbation predictions). CCOAOMT1 at 7 activators (at hard cap). No node exceeds limits.

hub_completeness.justification: Improved from 4. CCOAOMT1 now 10 of 19 curated edges (53%) with MYB74 added. F5H1 coverage 82%. SND1 75%. All hubs have defensible exclusions documented.

topology_hazards.justification: Unchanged. New edges did not introduce positive feedback; CCR2 and PT4CL1 are terminal enzymes with no downstream regulators of their own in the curated repo.

evidence_quality.justification: Unchanged. All three new edges cite primary papers (Leple 2007, De Meester 2020, Wang 2020, Voelker 2010, Li 2018).

phenotype_audit.justification: Improved from 4. Lignin_SG_Ratio now has 6 activators covering all major effector classes: branch-point enzyme F5H1, flux-gate enzymes CCR2 and PT4CL1, monomer pool Sinapyl_Alcohol, Layer-3 TF MYB152, environment Tension_Wood. Inhibitors: G-monomer pool Coniferyl_Alcohol and phenomenological C3H1 edge. Both promoting and repressing arms with enzyme, metabolite, TF, and environment inputs.

rejected_edges_review.justification: Improved from 4. MYB74 -> CCOAOMT1 re-added per iteration-1 S003. Remaining 47 rejected curated edges all have documented exclusion reasons (alt-splice variants, niche regulators, polymerization effects, MYB216 G002 exclusion, redundant Layer-2 MYBs).

key_player_density.justification: Improved from 4. All key players >=0.50 now. Updated ratios: CCOAOMT1 0.53 (up from 0.47), Lignin_SG_Ratio 0.53 (up from 0.40), MYB74 1.00 (up from 0.83), CCR2 0.78 (up from 0.67), PT4CL1 0.67 (up from 0.56). No under-represented hubs remain.

per_node_audit.comment: 6 activators + 2 inhibitors. Covers all major curated phenotype-level regulators that the cascade alone cannot capture. CCR2 and PT4CL1 flux-level preferential-S biology now modelable.
7 activators (at hard cap) + 2 inhibitors. MYB74 re-added per S003. Coverage now 53%.
Now has 2 outgoing edges: metabolic (Coniferaldehyde) AND flux-level phenotype direct. Coverage 78%.
Now has 2 outgoing edges. Preferential-S phenotype direct edge added per S002. Coverage 67%.
All 5 Li 2018 primary-paper direct targets now included. Coverage 100%.

per_pathway_audit.comment: CCR2 now has both cascade (via Coniferaldehyde) and direct flux (via LSGR) representation of the preferential-S-reduction biology.
F5H1, COMT1, CAD1 cascade + F5H1 direct + Sinapyl_Alcohol pool direct. Covers F5H OE and COMT KD perturbations.
MYB74 direct target expansion in iteration 2.
Unchanged - intentionally excluded as not S/G-specific.

suggestions.description: Residual gaps carried from iteration 1: upstream regulators for peripheral Layer-3 TFs (MYB152/90/161/NF_YA11/WBLH2/MYB156), monolignol degradation enzymes, PLT5 intermediate, PtrMYB28 poplar-specific primary paper, single F5H paralog KD phenotype.
suggestions.biological_justification: All documented in literature_judge_report.json residual_gaps_for_builder. Not BUILDER-actionable.
suggestions.implementation: No BUILDER action. Flag for future Step 1 re-run if perturbation-coverage issues surface.

literature_gaps: Monolignol degradation enzymes (for Motif 4 Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance)
Upstream promoter-binding evidence for PtrMYB152, PtrMYB090, PtrMYB161, NF_YA11, WBLH2, MYB156 in poplar
PtrMYB28 poplar-specific primary paper (Layer-3 lignin-specific MYB58/63 ortholog)
PtrVNS11/12/13/14 VND/NST/SND paralog family - fibre-vs-vessel distinction
Single F5H paralog RNAi/CRISPR poplar phenotype
